items.speaker: Noah
items.text: But his class is important.
items.translation: Pero su clase es importante.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L10-06 - E1106 - Noah - But his class is important.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Sure, but give it back later.
items.translation: Claro, pero devuélvelo después.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L13-06 - E1136 - Mia - Sure, but give it back later.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: She is quiet but helpful.
items.translation: Es tranquila pero servicial.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L14-06 - E1146 - Mia - She is quiet but helpful.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Yes, but your mother must sign.
items.translation: Sí, pero tu madre debe firmar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-06 - E1426 - Clerk - Yes, but your mother must sign.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: But it was a great day.
items.translation: Pero fue un gran día.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L49-06 - E1496 - Mia - But it was a great day.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: Yes, but I still get lost sometimes.
items.translation: Sí, pero todavía me pierdo a veces.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L02-06 - E2026 - Sofia - Yes, but I still get lost sometimes.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: But that one looks more professional.
items.translation: Pero aquella se ve más profesional.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L11-02 - E2112 - Ethan - But that one looks more professional.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Mine isn't the best, but I like it.
items.translation: La mía no es la mejor, pero me gusta.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L12-05 - E2125 - Ethan - Mine isn't the best, but I like it.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: But the drinks are cheap enough.
items.translation: Pero las bebidas son lo bastante baratas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L13-04 - E2134 - Emma - But the drinks are cheap enough.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Yes, but I need a larger one.
items.translation: Sí, pero necesito una más grande.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L17-02 - E2172 - Noah - Yes, but I need a larger one.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, but it hasn't shipped the package yet.
items.translation: Sí, pero aún no ha enviado el paquete.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-05 - E2185 - Emma - Yes, but it hasn't shipped the package yet.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, but the color is surprising.
items.translation: Sí, pero el color es sorprendente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L19-03 - E2193 - Emma - Yes, but the color is surprising.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: Yes, but only a small amount.
items.translation: Sí, pero solo una pequeña cantidad.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L21-06 - E2216 - Mother - Yes, but only a small amount.mp3

items.speaker: Doctor
items.text: No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.
items.translation: No, no tienes que hacerlo, pero evita el ejercicio.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-05 - E2235 - Doctor - No, you don't have to, but avoid exercise.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: No, but we must understand the main ideas.
items.translation: No, pero debemos entender las ideas principales.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-03 - E2243 - Emma - No, but we must understand the main ideas.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, but we must bring our own.
items.translation: Sí, pero debemos traer la nuestra.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L24-06 - E2246 - Emma - Yes, but we must bring our own.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I hope it stays sunny.
items.translation: Espero que siga soleado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L27-06 - E2276 - Ethan - I hope it stays sunny.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: But the city is a little more convenient.
items.translation: Pero la ciudad es un poco más conveniente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-02 - E2362 - Noah - But the city is a little more convenient.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: No, but I've helped at school events.
items.translation: No, pero he ayudado en eventos escolares.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L39-04 - E2394 - Ethan - No, but I've helped at school events.mp3

items.speaker: Customer
items.text: I bought this yesterday, but it's damaged.
items.translation: Compré esto ayer, pero está dañado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L42-01 - E2421 - Customer - I bought this yesterday, but it's damaged.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: But you've become much more independent.
items.translation: Pero te has vuelto mucho más independiente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L50-03 - E2503 - Noah - But you've become much more independent.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: I think so, but don't wait for me.
items.translation: Creo que sí, pero no me esperen.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L10-05 - BR1105 - Ben - I think so, but don't wait for me.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: No, but we'll get our money back.
items.translation: No, pero nos devolverán el dinero.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L17-04 - BR1174 - Nora - No, but we'll get our money back.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: But can we explain everything?
items.translation: ¿Pero podemos explicar todo?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L19-03 - BR1193 - Leo - But can we explain everything.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Yes, but I have to work late.
items.translation: Sí, pero tengo que trabajar hasta tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L25-03 - BR1253 - Nora - Yes, but I have to work late.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I hope you get the job.
items.translation: Espero que consigas el trabajo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L27-05 - BR1275 - Ava - I hope you get the job.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Not yet, but I'll work it out.
items.translation: Todavía no, pero lo resolveré.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L30-04 - BR1304 - Leo - Not yet, but I'll work it out.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Yes, but keep it natural.
items.translation: Sí, pero hazlo natural.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L34-02 - BR1342 - Ava - Yes, but keep it natural.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Yes, but it's informal.
items.translation: Sí, pero es informal.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L37-06 - BR1376 - Ava - Yes, but it's informal.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Exactly. But don't use it everywhere.
items.translation: Exactamente. Pero no lo uses en todas partes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L39-06 - BR1396 - Ava - Exactly. But don't use it everywhere.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: It's short, but everyone understands it.
items.translation: Es corta, pero todos la entienden.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L42-06 - BR1426 - Leo - It's short, but everyone understands it.mp3
